createDialog.title: Create New Organization
createDialog.description: Create a new organization to collaborate with your team.
createDialog.slugHelper: Used in URLs. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

inviteDialog.title: Invite Member
inviteDialog.description: Send an invitation to join your organization.
inviteDialog.roleHelper: Admins can manage members and organization settings.

memberList.title: Members
memberList.description: Manage members and their roles in {{orgName}}

invitationList.title: Pending Invitations
invitationList.confirmRevoke: Are you sure you want to revoke the invitation for {{email}}? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Organization Settings
settings.selectHelper: Choose an organization to view and manage its members
settings.deleteOrganizationDescription: Permanently delete this organization and all its data
settings.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {{orgName}}? This action cannot be undone.

loginRequired.title: Login Required
loginRequired.description: You need to be logged in to manage organization settings.

confirmRemoveMember: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the organization?

sharedProjects.title: Shared Projects
sharedProjects.description: Remote projects in {{orgName}} and their links to local projects
sharedProjects.noProjects: No shared projects found in this organization
sharedProjects.remoteProjectUnsupported: Remote project linking is unavailable because this backend version does not support remote project APIs.
sharedProjects.confirmUnlink: Are you sure you want to unlink "{{projectName}}"? The local project will remain, but it will no longer be linked to this remote project.
